title: ProseMirror plugin for rendering annotation highlights as inline decorations
purpose: Provides a ProseMirror plugin that manages annotation highlights in the editor by creating inline decorations based on annotation data and document changes.
module_context: Exports a plugin key, a meta setter function, and a plugin factory function. The plugin maintains a decoration set derived from annotations and updates it when the document changes or annotations are explicitly set.

steps.content: Attach the annotations array to the transaction using the setAnnotations meta key.
Return the transaction with the meta information included.
Initialize an empty array to hold decoration objects.
Iterate through each annotation in the annotations array.
Resolve the anchor position for each annotation within the document.
IF the anchor resolution fails or results in a zero-length range, skip this annotation.
Create an inline decoration for the resolved range with appropriate CSS classes and data attributes.
Add the decoration to the array of decorations.
Construct and return a DecorationSet from the document and collected decorations.
Create a new ProseMirror plugin with the annotations plugin key.
Initialize the plugin state with current annotations and their corresponding decorations.
Define the apply function to handle transaction updates.
IF the transaction contains setAnnotations meta, update the state with new annotations and rebuild decorations.
IF the document has changed, re-read annotations from the host reference and rebuild decorations.
Return the unchanged state if no relevant changes occurred.
Set up the decorations property to return the current plugin state's decorations.
